functions.name: test_preset_compact_expands_on_context
functions.docstring: --preset compact should set format=ultracompact, budget=2000, compress-imports, strip-comments.

functions.name: test_preset_minimal_expands_on_diff_context
functions.docstring: --preset minimal should set budget=1500, compress=two-stage, etc.

functions.name: test_preset_invalid_errors
functions.docstring: Invalid preset should exit with error listing valid presets.

functions.name: test_preset_not_valid_on_extract
functions.docstring: --preset should not be accepted on extract command.

functions.name: test_presets_subcommand
functions.docstring: tldrs presets should list available presets.
